name: tweet-grid
title: Tweet Grid
author: Parable
description: A masonry-ish testimonial wall of tweet cards that fade and rise into view with a staggered column cascade and lift on hover, built on pure CSS multi-column layout that steps down responsively while keeping screen-reader reading order. Under prefers-reduced-motion the grid is fully static — no stagger, hover lift, or sheen — with every card legible at rest.
